\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{asymptote}

\begin{document}

\begin{asy}
 /* Geogebra to Asymptote conversion, documentation at artofproblemsolving.com/Wiki go to User:Azjps/geogebra */
import graph; size(7.346451134370179cm); 
real labelscalefactor = 0.5; /* changes label-to-point distance */
pen dps = linewidth(0.7) + fontsize(10); defaultpen(dps); /* default pen style */ 
pen dotstyle = black; /* point style */ 
real xmin = -3.7829345985631564, xmax = 3.563516535807023, ymin = -2.823592308044096, ymax = 3.879946347117573;  /* image dimensions */
pen cczzqq = rgb(0.8,0.6,0.); pen qqwuqq = rgb(0.,0.39215686274509803,0.); pen dcrutc = rgb(0.8627450980392157,0.0784313725490196,0.23529411764705882); 

draw((0.5,2.)--(-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965)--(1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384)--cycle, linewidth(0.7) + cczzqq); 
 /* draw figures */
draw((0.5,2.)--(-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965), linewidth(0.7) + cczzqq); 
draw((-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965)--(1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384), linewidth(0.7) + cczzqq); 
draw((1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384)--(0.5,2.), linewidth(0.7) + cczzqq); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965), linewidth(0.7)); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(0.5,2.), linewidth(0.7)); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384), linewidth(0.7)); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965), linewidth(0.7) + qqwuqq); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(0.5,2.), linewidth(0.7) + qqwuqq); 
draw((0.5,2.)--(1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387), linewidth(0.7) + dcrutc); 
draw((1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387)--(1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384), linewidth(0.7) + dcrutc); 
draw(circle((-0.7793588150026292,0.7001813924686874), 1.8238112265280009), linewidth(0.7) + dotted); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(-0.7945314282604341,-1.1235667211195077), linewidth(0.7) + linetype("4 4")); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(-0.7945314282604341,-1.1235667211195077), linewidth(0.7) + dotted); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(-1.7027806683380826,-0.8725803411680665), linewidth(0.7) + qqwuqq); 
draw((1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387)--(-0.7945314282604341,-1.1235667211195077), linewidth(0.7) + dotted); 
draw((1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387)--(0.11776795129085182,-0.8877263363396883), linewidth(0.7) + dcrutc); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387), linewidth(0.7)); 
draw((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492)--(-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993), linewidth(0.7) + qqwuqq); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387), linewidth(0.7) + dcrutc); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(-1.7027806683380826,-0.8725803411680665), linewidth(0.7)); 
draw((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993)--(0.11776795129085182,-0.8877263363396883), linewidth(0.7)); 
 /* dots and labels */
dot((0.5,2.),dotstyle); 
label("$A$", (0.5292832497864685,2.0766552468986443), NE * labelscalefactor); 
dot((-2.795044691486694,-0.8634932860669965),dotstyle); 
label("$B$", (-2.92833142498114,-1.0203012078251676), SE * labelscalefactor); 
dot((1.917033357346258,-0.9026952665065384),dotstyle); 
label("$C$", (2.0267989025769744,-1.0516627921768011), NE * labelscalefactor); 
dot((-0.4337642323997367,-0.2530738288948993),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$O$", (-0.35372388467463227,-0.18921922250687878), NW * labelscalefactor); 
dot((-2.2266328852072075,1.8099945099452492),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$O_1$", (-2.1991745888056577,1.8728049486130265), NW * labelscalefactor); 
dot((1.0286824510626467,0.46086116721673387),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$O_2$", (1.0624301837642403,0.3242568214927843), S * labelscalefactor); 
dot((-1.7027806683380826,-0.8725803411680665),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$P$", (-1.6738680509157946,-1), S * labelscalefactor); 
dot((0.11776795129085182,-0.8877263363396883),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$Q$", (0.1529442375668648,-1), S * labelscalefactor); 
dot((-0.7945314282604341,-1.1235667211195077),linewidth(4.pt) + dotstyle); 
label("$O_3$", (-0.764382104718419,-1.1895031882647095), S * labelscalefactor); 
clip((xmin,ymin)--(xmin,ymax)--(xmax,ymax)--(xmax,ymin)--cycle); 
 /* end of picture */

\end{asy}
